author: Andy Zheng（公众号：关山的月儿）
description: BEST sync plugin for Dedao-Brain, try it! - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Andy Zheng
manifest.description: Bidirectional sync for notes, links, recordings, and AI summaries between GetNote / 得到大脑（原Get笔记） and your local vault.
manifest.name: Dedao Brain Sync

releases.author: AndyZhengyan
releases.description:
## What's new in 1.3.1

- 🗂️ 定时同步配置聚合：同步范围、笔记类型、标签过滤、目标知识库统一收拢到「启用定时同步」面板。
- 🛠️ 设置页折叠更紧凑：主开关后内联「更多 / 收起」超链接。
- 🏷️ 标签管理增强：首次打开设置页自动种草首屏标签；过滤弹窗标签下拉只读，仅自动同步允许新增。
- 📜 标签下拉去重对齐：去除嵌套滚动条，checkbox 固定尺寸，菜单内容不加粗。
- 🖱️ 附件主开关修复：声明式 Toggle，单次生效；关闭时子项同步禁用。
- 🎛️ 知识库同步弹窗重构：标题改为「选择要同步的知识库」，工具栏整合到一行。


## What's Changed
* docs: refresh README release highlights and enforce release policy by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/153
* Fix scheduled sync toggle click target by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/154


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/compare/1.3.0...1.3.1

releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix(sync): harden generic attachment downloads by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/130
* chore(deps-dev): bump esbuild from 0.28.0 to 0.28.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/129
* chore(deps-dev): refresh test and build tools by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/132
* chore(deps-dev): bump the test-and-build-tools group across 1 directory with 2 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/133
* test(api): add spec for fetchSubscribedKnowledgeNotes topicIds filter by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/134
* fix(render): 拆分 audio attachment 与 transcript 判断，让无转写音频也能渲染录音链接 (#127) by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/142
* refactor(settings): 单个 on/off 开关统一改用 Obsidian Toggle（去掉 checkbox）(#136) by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/146
* refactor(settings): 附件下载配置改用独立栏目（总开关 + 4 子开关，中间位置）(#135) by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/145
* feat(sync): 同步断点重置（重设起始时间 + 清除 checkpoint，恢复误删笔记）(#139) by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/147
* feat(ui): 两个同步 modal 笔记列表改为瀑布流卡片样式（按笔记 + 按知识库详情）(#138) by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/143
* fix(ui): address card preview review findings by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/150
* refactor(ui): 笔记类型选项统一为 5 个 group，隐藏内部 audio 9 种 + 订阅博主 (#141) by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/144
* feat(scheduled): 定时自动同步区加'知识库'多选下拉（跨库同步 + 增量跳过）(#140) by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/148
* feat(sync): tag 白名单过滤（多选下拉 + 模糊搜索，覆盖 4 个同步入口）(#137) by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/149
* chore: release 1.3.0 by @AndyZhengyan in https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/pull/151


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AndyZhengyan/obsidian-dedao-brain-sync/compare/1.2.4...1.3.0

releases.author: AndyZhengyan
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Fix**: Auto-sync checkpoint no longer re-processes boundary notes on every run
- **Docs**: Bilingual README (README.md + README_zh.md)
- **Screenshots**: Added 4 UI screenshots to docs/screenshots/
- **Tests**: 11 new test cases for boundary filtering, lastNoteTimestamp tracking, cross-page dedup

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
